The '''Mennaalii system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|system]] in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]], and contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mrlsst/Legends|Mrlsst]]. It was in the [[Freeworlds Territory]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]], on the [[Shapani Bypass]].

While passing through this system to avoid navigating through an [[asteroid field]], a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] convoy consisting of two [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] designated ''[[Xroi]]'' and three [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] designated ''[[Qiluiy|Quluiy]]'' was attacked by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]]. An [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] responsive force soon followed, attemping to rout both factions before they could escape. However, Rebel [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] managed to drive the pirates and Imperials away without losing any craft in the convoy.
